news_bbc.title: SpaceX says it's worth $1.75tn as it targets largest stock market debut
news_bbc.summary: Elon Musk’s space exploration company set a target share price for buyers earlier than expected.

news_bbc.title: 'I lost thousands in savings and my partner's money is in limbo'
news_bbc.summary: The number of people withdrawing money from a LISA is outpacing the number using one to buy a home. Why?

news_bbc.title: Three-quarters of workers not on track for 'moderate' pension income, report suggests
news_bbc.summary: A newly-published report suggests a moderate lifestyle in retirement costs £32,700 for one person and £45,400 for two.

news_bbc.title: Who is Elon Musk and what is his net worth?
news_bbc.summary: The boss of X, Tesla and SpaceX is the world's richest person and has used his platform to make his views known on a vast array of topics.

news_bbc.title: Universal park officially named as government pledges £1.3bn
news_bbc.summary: The government's contribution is going towards upgrading local infrastructure and transport links.

news_bbc.title: 'By the grace of God': Miners dig on as lab-grown diamonds change market
news_bbc.summary: The rising popularity of lab-grown diamonds heaps pressure on those hunting for the natural gems.

news_bbc.title: Costly fuel pushes more Indians to buy electric cars but challenges remain
news_bbc.summary: High fuel prices are strengthening the case for EV adoption in the world's third largest auto market.

news_bbc.title: US announces new tariffs over forced labour concerns
news_bbc.summary: It comes after the US Supreme Court struck down many of US President Donald Trump's previous duties in February.
